creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


The functionality to kill something by process name is already covered 
by killall(1).  The functionality to signal some process by PID file 
seems useful, too, but IMHO should not be crunched into kill(1).  A 
simple shell script would do way better here (what about `signal' for 
a name?).
